arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as Rice, Odegaard, Merino and Havertz updates for Chelsea
arts.sum: "Everybody that is in the squad is going to be fit and available to start the game, so then it will be a decision whether it is too early or the right moment for him to make that step again," Arteta said regarding Odegaard's involvement against Chelsea. However, Mikel Arteta admitted in his pre-match press conference that he doesn't know whether Rice will be fit enough for the game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed fresh William Saliba transfer exit concern amid major Real Madrid injury setback
arts.sum: He has been one of the standout centre-backs in the Premier League since being given his opportunity under Arteta in 2022, having initially looked like he might struggle to make it into the Spaniard's plans at the Emirates Stadium. However, Arsenal may have no choice but to listen to Real Madrid make an offer for the centre-back, and that offer could come as soon as the January transfer window now.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta needs urgent Arsenal meeting with duo ahead of key Chelsea clash - Tom Canton
arts.sum: While a quality player who scored a vital goal at Aston Villa already this season, the interior role has hamstrung his game. The second player is one instead who needs a lift, Gabriel Jesus.

arts.ttl: Arsenal can steal a march on Premier League rivals with double January transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal could steal a march on their Premier League rivals with some key business in the January transfer window . Arsenal will also need another No.6, with Thomas Partey and Jorginho both in the final year of their contracts and set to depart the Emirates Stadium on a free in the summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have perfect sporting director blueprint as another former star emerges to replace Edu
arts.sum: He chose better physically equipped players and crucially he chose Brian Priske with whom came a whole different culture to the club that Rosický fully supported and craved for a long time. “His old mate Tomáš Sivok was also a crucial appointment as a sporting manager who worked as his extended hand into the dressing room and a support for the coaches, there was an incredible step up in terms of motivation among players, professionalism, analysis in terms of matches but also recruitment, and foremost in fitness thanks to Christian Clarup, their head of performance.

arts.sum: Chelsea against Arsenal is always a big fixture but tomorrow’s clash seems to feel that bit bigger thanks to the resurgence of the Blues under...

arts.ttl: Gary Neville says Arsenal have a £27m player who is the best in the world right now
arts.sum: The talent pool at the top-level of world football has perhaps never been deeper. There are a whole host of world-class players within the game,...

arts.ttl: Chelsea's classy gesture for Moises Caicedo after £115m transfer speaks volumes
arts.sum: Chelsea helped to ensure Moises Caicedo's mother was safe to ally the player's fears in his early days at the club. The situation in Caicedo's home country of Ecuador - when he made the transfer from Brighton to Chelsea in the summer of 2023 - means that he had concerns both he and his family could be targeted by criminal organisations.

arts.ttl: Chelsea accept €74m loss on record signing
arts.sum: Kepa Arrizabalaga will be able to leave Chelsea for just €6 million next summer, according to a report. If triggered, any potential transfer would see Chelsea make an eye-watering loss on Kepa because his clause is worth just €6m, the report claims.

arts.ttl: Insider says Arsenal could “try and make a move” for Premier League star with 64 goals & 22 assists
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking ahead to potential additions in the next summer transfer window, with Mohammed Kudus of West Ham emerging as a key target. According to Football Insider, the Gunners have been monitoring the Ghanaian winger as they aim to boost their attacking depth for the next season.
